creator.name: KDNA Team
creator.bio: Official KDNA domain authors maintaining editorial judgment standards.

audience.who_should_use: Anyone who writes or edits content where argument quality matters — blog posts, proposals, documentation, reports, essays, and editorial content.
audience.who_should_not_use: Copy editors looking for grammar/spellcheck. This domain judges structure and argument, not surface language.
prerequisites: Understanding of what constitutes an argument vs. a statement

judgment_style.summary: Diagnose whether content has a real argument, a cognitive hook, and evidence density. Not copy editing.
strengths: Distinguishes structural problems from language-level problems
Identifies missing argument core in seemingly well-written text
Detects evidence gaps disguised as confident tone
Surfaces reader psychology: why someone stops reading
limitations: Does not judge creative/fiction writing quality
Does not perform grammar or spelling checks
Assumes English-language writing conventions; Chinese/Japanese structural norms may differ

sample_inputs.scenario: A 2000-word blog post about 'Why our company is great' with no specific claim or counterargument.
sample_inputs.without_kdna: Model describes the post's structure, suggests minor wording improvements, calls it 'well-written'.
sample_inputs.with_kdna: Model flags: no core argument, no cognitive hook in first 100 words, zero evidence density — the post is an advertisement disguised as thought leadership.

sample_inputs.scenario: A technical documentation page that is factually correct but written for the wrong audience level.
sample_inputs.without_kdna: Model confirms accuracy of technical content, suggests minor clarifications.
sample_inputs.with_kdna: Model detects audience misalignment: content assumes senior engineer context but target audience is junior developers. Recommends restructuring around progressive disclosure.

update_policy.versioning: Semver for structure. judgment_version (YYYY.MM) tracks when judgment was last revised.
update_policy.breaking_change_policy: Major judgment changes ship as new major version. Minor axiom refinements documented in changelog.

evidence._note: This domain has not yet been benchmarked. quality_badge reflects current state. See KDNA/benchmarks/ for eval infrastructure.
